invariant: Every pilot jolt is prompt, attention, representation, or fixed scheduling context only and is recorded as a Measure event.
forbidden_effects: add an attack or dependence edge
alter an anti-relapse threshold or domain
alter a verifier, judge, acceptance, or survivor threshold
adapt a trigger threshold after observing outcomes

arms.name: no_intervention
arms.receipt: jolt-action Measure with empty prompt and no focus change

arms.name: stance_rotation
arms.status_safety: does not call capture.schools.reseed and does not create a school-policy artifact

arms.name: problem_turnover
arms.schedule: calls 1-2 use the frozen related problem; calls 3-5 return to the original problem
arms.eligibility: related problem exists before randomisation and is bound in the branch manifest
arms.forbidden: creating a new easier problem after the trigger

arms.name: representation_reset

templates.code: Restate the next proposal as state, invariant, transition, and executable check.
templates.finite: Restate the next proposal as a finite-domain table, recurrence, or exhaustive predicate.
templates.simulation: Restate the next proposal as state variables, transition rule, seed, and deterministic score.
templates.formal: Restate the next proposal as assumptions, obligations, and a machine-checkable witness shape.
templates.browser: Restate the next proposal as page state, deterministic action sequence, and observable postconditions.

arms.forbidden: adding a new factual or mathematical premise

arms.name: verifier_directed_challenge
allowed_changes: prompt context grounded in public deterministic failure classes
arms.prompt_shape: Name one public unresolved failure class and request a proposal based on a different invariant.

arms.name: external_information_injection
arms.reason: existing evidence registration changes support and status and information-limited task eligibility is not yet frozen

arms.name: generic_complement
arms.prompt: Avoid the modal continuation of the displayed approaches; propose a structurally different attempt.
arms.prior: reduced prompt echo without material novelty restoration

arms.name: temperature_increase
arms.reason: changes validity and transport risk as well as sampling diversity, and provider nondeterminism is already a major pilot limitation

branch_rules.branch_order: deterministic seeded permutation recorded before execution
